evals.name: vitest-add
evals.prompt: We're starting to use Vitest as our JS test runner across new projects, replacing Jest. Add it to the radar.
evals.expected_output: A new markdown file under radar/<latest-snapshot>/vitest.md with valid frontmatter (title, ring, quadrant=tools, featured), Why/Considerations sections, internal links to related entries.

evals.name: bun-assess
evals.prompt: Add Bun to the radar — we want to evaluate it for tooling, not committed yet.
evals.expected_output: A new markdown file at radar/<snapshot>/bun.md with ring=assess, appropriate quadrant (tools or platforms-and-operations), ADR-shape body emphasizing evaluation context.

evals.name: ddd-method
evals.prompt: Document our decision to use Domain-Driven Design as our primary methodology for new services.
evals.expected_output: A new markdown file under radar/<snapshot>/domain-driven-design.md with quadrant=methods-and-patterns, ring=adopt, ADR-style decision body referencing context and trade-offs.
